task_completion.description: Verify that the default font size is set to Large (or at least 20px) and the minimum font size is set to 16px in Edge settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Microsoft Edge 'Appearance' or 'Customize fonts' settings page with the default font size set to Large/20+ and minimum font size slider/input set to 16.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Home button is enabled on the toolbar and its URL is set to https://www.usa.gov.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Microsoft Edge settings page for 'Start, home, and new tabs' or 'Appearance' with the 'Show home button' toggle enabled and the custom URL set to https://www.usa.gov.

task_completion.description: Verify that Microsoft Edge is configured to open https://www.usa.gov on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Microsoft Edge settings page for 'Start, home, and new tabs' with the 'Open these pages' option selected under 'When Edge starts', and https://www.usa.gov added to the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent visited both https://www.usa.gov and https://www.ssa.gov.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Microsoft Edge actively displaying the usa.gov and ssa.gov websites, or the browser history showing visits to both sites.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reference document accessibility_config_guide.txt was created on the Desktop with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a text editor or terminal showing a file named 'accessibility_config_guide.txt' located on the Desktop, containing text that mentions the font size changes (Large/20px, min 16px) and the homepage URL (usa.gov).

integrity.description: Verify that Microsoft Edge was actually launched and its settings GUI was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Microsoft Edge browser window and its settings interface, not just terminal commands modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify that the websites were actually loaded in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the rendered web pages for usa.gov and ssa.gov in Edge, or genuine browser history entries, rather than mockups or text files.

integrity.description: Verify that the reference document contains a human-readable summary of the changes, not just a copy-paste of the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in accessibility_config_guide.txt should be formatted as a guide or summary for staff members, rather than the exact prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The default font size must be at least 20px, and the minimum font size must be 16px. The homepage and startup page must be set to 'usa.gov'. The agent must visit both 'usa.gov' and 'ssa.gov'. A reference document must be created at '/home/ga/Desktop/accessibility_config_guide.txt' detailing the font size and homepage changes.
